description: You are preparing a prop computer terminal for an interactive escape room. Transcode the surveillance footage at /home/ga/Videos/briefing_raw.mp4 to /home/ga/Videos/kiosk_loop.mp4 as a silent, inverted-color H.264 MP4 at 1280x720 resolution. Create a VLC configuration file at /home/ga/Documents/kiosk_vlcrc containing the settings: fullscreen=1, loop=1 (or repeat=1), video-title-show=0, key-quit=Unset, and key-play-pause=Unset. Create an executable bash script at /home/ga/Desktop/start_kiosk.sh that launches VLC using the custom configuration and the transcoded video.
